title: DISABILITIES COORDINATION - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS DISABILITIES COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides service coordination, educational information, and training for families, workplaces, and other agencies. Topics include, but are not limited to, Social Security, retirement benefits, survivor/widow benefits, adult and child disability benefits, senior and disability resources, home care worker information, and Social Security appeals assistance. 1233 Veterans Street Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Individuals with a disability or potential disability or disability that is going to affect them for 12 months or longer Hours: No standard hours (541) 553-1161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-1161 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card and related documents AREA SERVED: Warm Springs Reservation Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Benefits and Services Assistance * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS
